mapper.sql: o.id, o.resumeId, o.interviewId, o.candidateName, o.phone, o.email, o.positionId, o.positionName, o.departmentId, o.departmentName, o.salary, o.probation, o.entryTime, o.validUntil, o.status, o.sendTime, o.viewTime, o.viewStatus, o.confirmTime, o.rejectReason, o.entryReminderSent, o.createTime, o.updateTime, o.createBy, o.remark
mapper.select: SELECT , p.id as pid, p.name as pname, d.id as did, d.name as dname FROM `offer` o LEFT JOIN position p ON o.positionId = p.id LEFT JOIN department d ON o.departmentId = d.id WHERE o.id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
SELECT FROM `offer` o WHERE o.status = '已接受' AND o.entryReminderSent = 0 AND o.entryTime IS NOT NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `offer` (resumeId, interviewId, candidateName, phone, email, positionId, positionName, departmentId, departmentName, salary, probation, entryTime, validUntil, status, viewStatus, entryReminderSent, createBy, remark) VALUES (#{resumeId}, #{interviewId}, #{candidateName}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{positionId}, #{positionName}, #{departmentId}, #{departmentName}, #{salary}, #{probation}, #{entryTime}, #{validUntil}, #{status}, #{viewStatus}, #{entryReminderSent}, #{createBy}, #{remark})

INSERT INTO `offer`
resumeId, interviewId, candidateName, phone, email, positionId, positionName, departmentId, departmentName, salary, probation, entryTime, validUntil, status, sendTime, viewStatus, entryReminderSent, createBy, remark,
#{resumeId}, #{interviewId}, #{candidateName}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{positionId}, #{positionName}, #{departmentId}, #{departmentName}, #{salary}, #{probation}, #{entryTime}, #{validUntil}, #{status}, #{sendTime}, #{viewStatus}, #{entryReminderSent}, #{createBy}, #{remark},
mapper.update: UPDATE `offer` SET viewStatus = '已查看', viewTime = NOW(), updateTime = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE `offer` SET resumeId = #{resumeId}, interviewId = #{interviewId}, candidateName = #{candidateName}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, positionId = #{positionId}, positionName = #{positionName}, departmentId = #{departmentId}, departmentName = #{departmentName}, salary = #{salary}, probation = #{probation}, entryTime = #{entryTime}, validUntil = #{validUntil}, status = #{status}, sendTime = #{sendTime}, viewStatus = #{viewStatus}, confirmTime = #{confirmTime}, rejectReason = #{rejectReason}, entryReminderSent = #{entryReminderSent}, createBy = #{createBy}, remark = #{remark}, updateTime = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
